# Odysseus AI Workspace Training

Learn to configure secure, self-hosted Odysseus AI workspaces on remote servers from scratch. Master the deployment process end-to-end so you can sell complete, privacy-focused AI systems to clients who need full control over their data.

💵 $250
⏱ 20 Hours
📅 2 Weeks
🎯 Guru · Freelancer · Upwork

Prefer to skip the training and have it done for you? [**Hire us for Odysseus AI Workspace Support**](/linux-ai-services/odysseus-ai-services/) instead.

## What Is Odysseus AI Workspace Training?

Odysseus AI Workspace Training is School of Freelancing's 20-hour, instructor-led course that teaches you to provision a remote Ubuntu server and configure it as a secure, self-hosted Odysseus AI workspace — a private AI system you control end-to-end on your own remote server, rather than a third-party cloud AI service, for clients who need full control over their data. It's built for freelancers and IT professionals who want to specialize in privacy-focused, self-hosted AI deployments and sell them as a freelance service.

## Key Takeaways

- **Format:** Online, instructor-led, hands-on
- **Duration:** 20 hours over 2 weeks
- **Price:** $250 USD, paid in full before enrollment
- **Covers:** Remote server provisioning, secure self-hosted Odysseus AI workspace deployment, privacy-focused AI system architecture and access controls, hardening against unauthorized access/data leakage, ongoing maintenance, and selling privacy-focused AI systems as a service
- **Best for:** Freelancers and IT professionals who want to specialize in privacy-focused, self-hosted AI deployments

### Participation Requirements

### Training Prerequisites

- **[DigitalOcean:](https://try.digitalocean.com/freetrialoffer/)** Ubuntu Linux Server (24.04 or 26.04 LTS recommended).
- **Domain:** Any domain or sub domain will work.
- **Freelance Marketplace:** Verified Upwork · Guru · Freelancer Account.
- **Land Direct Clients:** From Linkedin and YouTube Account.
- **Rigorous:** Need to have patience and concentration during all training sessions.

### Connectivity

- Portable messaging devices for 24/7 client communication.
- Reliable fiber-optic internet access for uninterruptible training sessions.

## What You'll Learn

- Provisioning remote servers and deploying secure, self-hosted Odysseus AI workspaces
- Configuring privacy-focused AI system architecture and access controls
- Hardening remote deployments against unauthorized access and data leakage
- Maintaining and updating self-hosted AI workspaces for ongoing clients
- Selling complete privacy-focused AI systems as a freelance service offering

## Who This Is For

This training suits freelancers and IT professionals who want to specialize in privacy-focused, self-hosted AI deployments and can commit to 20 hours of hands-on, instructor-led training over 5 days, and who meet the
[system & participation requirements](/contact-us/) (Ubuntu Desktop 24.04/26.04 LTS PC, reliable fiber-optic internet, and a valid government-issued ID).
